chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 212 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 22.03.2023 Mr. Irshad Hussain Dharejo, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Zeeshan Haider Qureshi, Law Officer of Election Commission of Pakistan. Mr. Muhammad Aslam Jatoi, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Chandio, Additional Advocate General Sindh and Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Qurban Ali Malano, Advocate files his power along with an application under Order I Rule 10, C.P.C. for adding one of the candidates for forthcoming Local Bodies Election as respondent. Learned Counsel for the petitioner waives notice and after receiving copy of the application states that this petition may be disposed of by directing to the Election Commission of Pakistan to hold forthcoming re-polling at G.P.S. Tando Shah fairly and impartially under the strict supervision in terms of deployment of sufficient security/police officials at the polling station. Mr. Malano, learned Counsel appearing for the applicant/ intervenor records his no objection to the proposition of the learned Counsel for the petitioner. Accordingly, in terms of the above proposition of learned Counsel for the petitioner, instant petition stands disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
